name: kimify-commands
description: Kimify slash commands as Kimi CLI plugin tools. Exposes every .agents/commands/*.md file as an agent-callable tool.

tools.name: kimify_command
tools.description: Run a Kimify slash command by name. Available commands: audit, brief, clear, competitive-intel, debt-map, drift-detect, handoff, launch, note, onboard, playbook, proposal, release, report, retro, review, standup, start, sync, system-audit, unstick, wrap-up. Reads the corresponding .agents/commands/<name>.md file and returns its procedure.

name.description: Command name, e.g. start, sync, wrap-up, audit
